reach_why: Recursive error amplification and narrative bias are familiar; pretrained-manifold mitigation is a modest extension.
novelty_why: Connects search contamination, inductive bias compression, and retrospective storytelling into one underdetermination frame.
falsifiable_why: Compare recursive versus non-recursive search under controlled false-positive rates and pretrained priors.
explanation: Success may reflect prior structure or recursively amplified error, while narratives obscure which.
